rationale: The citing paper references Weaver and Prelec (2013) only in grouped introductory citations about prior marketing work on truth-telling and sensitive survey responses. The core contribution, model development, simulations, and empirical application are built around ICT/ICRT and item response theory, without using or testing Bayesian Truth Serum directly. Because the cited paper is not given a distinct conceptual, methodological, or interpretive role in the argument, this functions as background mention rather than a substantive link.
